_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
condition: Nephrectomy - Partial or Hemi (for Benign conditions)
source_files: Nephrectomy - Partial or Hemi (for Benign conditions) _Medco.pdf
Nephrectomy - Partial or Hemi (for Benign conditions)_PPD.CPD.pdf
min_doctor_qualification: MS/DNB or Equivalent (in Urology, Pediatric Surgery)
clinical_indications: Chronic pyelonephritis, renal arterial disease, calculus disease
Tumour in a solitary kidney, treatment of T1 renal cell cancer (RCC)
Partial nephrectomy for tumour/masses size small (<4 cm in size)
Partial nephrectomy for renal masses between 4-7 Cm (based on their location)
In children to remove a non-functioning upper or lower pole secondary to complicated duplex anomalies of the kidney

clinical_thresholds.note: generally treated with Radical nephrectomy (implying <=7cm for partial)

preauth.label: Clinical notes including evaluation findings and planned line of treatment

ppd_preauth.q: Was the clinical notes and CT/MRI scan, IVP (for Open.) are indicative of procedure?

common_queries: Clinical notes and/or CT/MRI scan/IVP (for Open.) are not indicative of the procedure
CT/MRI scan or IVP (for Open.) report is missing at pre-authorization
Intra operative photograph is missing at claim submission
Histopathology report is missing at claim submission

clinical_key_pointers: Recent developments in imaging techniques, preoperative staging, improvements in surgical techniques have made nephron-sparing surgery (NSS) an alternative to radical nephrectomy in select patients.
surgical_options: Open Partial/hemi Nephrectomy: A surgical procedure involves a transperitoneal incision or an extraperitoneal incision, typically in patients with one kidney, pre-existing chronic kidney diseases and tumours located in centre kidney are typically managed with open partial/hemi nephrectomy to save as much as kidney part.
